'''dhasofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:averruncator|averruncator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:averruncator|averruncator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhasofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsefeth|dhæsefeth]] || [[word:dhæsefej|dhæsefej]] || [[word:dhæsefesh|dhæsefesh]] || [[word:dhæsefe|dhæsefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasosofoth|dhasosofoth]] || [[word:dhasosofoj|dhasosofoj]] || [[word:dhasosofosh|dhasosofosh]] || [[word:dhasosofo|dhasosofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasofoth|dhasofoth]] || [[word:dhasofoj|dhasofoj]] || [[word:dhasofosh|dhasofosh]] || [[word:dhasofo|dhasofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasoffoth|dhasoffoth]] || [[word:dhasoffoj|dhasoffoj]] || [[word:dhasoffosh|dhasoffosh]] || [[word:dhasoffof|dhasoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasofotho|dhasofotho]] || [[word:dhasofojo|dhasofojo]] || [[word:dhasofosho|dhasofosho]] || [[word:dhasofoko|dhasofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasofoth|dhasofoth]] || [[word:dhasofoj|dhasofoj]] || [[word:dhasofosh|dhasofosh]] || [[word:dhasofo|dhasofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasofothol|dhasofothol]] || [[word:dhasofojol|dhasofojol]] || [[word:dhasofoshol|dhasofoshol]] || [[word:dhasofokol|dhasofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasofothotho|dhasofothotho]] || [[word:dhasofojojo|dhasofojojo]] || [[word:dhasofoshosho|dhasofoshosho]] || [[word:dhasofoko|dhasofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasofothon|dhasofothon]] || [[word:dhasofojon|dhasofojon]] || [[word:dhasofoshon|dhasofoshon]] || [[word:dhasofokon|dhasofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasofothoro|dhasofothoro]] || [[word:dhasofojoro|dhasofojoro]] || [[word:dhasofoshoro|dhasofoshoro]] || [[word:dhasofokoro|dhasofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
